{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = essence (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can call upon essence to slow time and fill his lungs with ice-cold light.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] called [[steel]] and essence to flood through him.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
